note: PACKAGING-ONLY release. pgmnemo--0.7.2.sql is byte-identical to pgmnemo--0.7.1.sql (modulo header version comment); pgmnemo--0.7.1--0.7.2.sql is a documented no-op (no DDL). No function bodies, signatures, indexes, or scoring change. Recall behaviour is identical to v0.7.1. The only change is the distribution structure (un-nested extension/ dir) plus a new CI clean-room install gate. Analytical carry-forward of the v0.7.1 gate is valid; no new benchmark run is warranted.

packaging_fix.description: v0.7.1 published dist double-nested the extension directory (pgmnemo-0.7.1/extension/extension/), making CREATE EXTENSION fail with 'could not open extension control file'. v0.7.2 ships a single-level pgmnemo-0.7.2/extension/ dir.
packaging_fix.verification: clean-room install of the BUILT zip into pgvector/pgvector:pg17; CREATE EXTENSION vector; CREATE EXTENSION pgmnemo; SELECT pgmnemo.version() => 0.7.2
